name: team_unit_dvoa range year_offset averages the dynamic dvoa column
description: team_unit_dvoa renders via a custom main_select because its column is dynamic (dvoa_type -> total_dvoa). For a range year_offset the alias is dropped, so the bespoke override resolves the dynamic column and AVGs it across the offset-expanded window, scoped to the team_unit discriminator.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT AVG(dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index.total_dvoa) FROM dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index WHERE dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index.nfl_team = player.current_nfl_team AND dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index.year IN (2024,2025) AND dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index.team_unit = 'OFFENSE') AS "team_unit_dvoa_0", "player"."pos" from "player" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
